search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system |  select  regexp_extract("user.username", '^system:node:(.*)', 1) as "节点名", date_format(from_unixtime(max(__time__)), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "最近活跃时间", max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as "可分配CPU", max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.memory", __time__) as "可分配内存" , max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.pods", __time__) as "可分配Pod", max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.kubeletVersion", __time__) as "kubelet版本" , max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.kubeproxyVersion", __time__) as "kubeproxy版本" , max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.containerRuntimeVersion", __time__) as "containerRuntime版本" , max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.kernelVersion", __time__) as "kernel版本"   from log group by "节点名" order by "最近活跃时间" DESC
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system |  select  regexp_extract("user.username", '^system:node:(.*)', 1) as "节点名", date_format(from_unixtime(max(__time__)), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "最近活跃时间", max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.cpu", __time__) as "可分配CPU", max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.memory", __time__) as "可分配内存" , max_by( "responseObject.status.allocatable.pods", __time__) as "可分配Pod", max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.kubeletVersion", __time__) as "kubelet版本" , max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.kubeproxyVersion", __time__) as "kubeproxy版本" , max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.containerRuntimeVersion", __time__) as "containerRuntime版本" , max_by( "responseObject.status.nodeInfo.kernelVersion", __time__) as "kernel版本"   from log group by "节点名" order by "最近活跃时间" DESC

search.query:
* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", regexp_extract( "requestURI", 'nodes/([^/\?]+)', 1) as "节点", 
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号",  json_extract(requestObject, '$.metadata.labels') as Label, 
case when requestObject like '%null%' or requestObject like '%false%' then '删除' else '增加/修改' end as "操作类型", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID" from log where json_extract(requestObject, '$.metadata.labels') is not null  order by "操作时间" desc
search.tokenQuery:
* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", regexp_extract( "requestURI", 'nodes/([^/\?]+)', 1) as "节点", 
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号",  json_extract(requestObject, '$.metadata.labels') as Label, 
case when requestObject like '%null%' or requestObject like '%false%' then '删除' else '增加/修改' end as "操作类型", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID" from log where json_extract(requestObject, '$.metadata.labels') is not null  order by "操作时间" desc

search.query:
* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", regexp_extract( "requestURI", 'nodes/([^/\?]+)', 1) as "节点", 
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", 
case when requestObject like '%null%' or requestObject like '%false%' then 'uncordon' else 'cordon' end as "操作类型", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID" from log where json_extract(requestObject, '$.spec.unschedulable') is not null   order by "操作时间" desc

 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", 
case when requestObject like '%null%' or requestObject like '%false%' then 'uncordon' else 'cordon' end as "操作类型", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END

search.query:
* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", regexp_extract( "requestURI", 'nodes/([^/\?]+)', 1) as "节点",  
json_extract(requestObject, '$.spec.taints') as "更新内容",
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID"  from log where json_extract(requestObject, '$.spec.taints') is not null   order by "操作时间" desc

* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", regexp_extract( "requestURI", 'nodes/([^/\?]+)', 1) as "节点",  
json_extract(requestObject, '$.spec.taints') as "更新内容",
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID"  from log where json_extract(requestObject, '$.spec.taints') is not null   order by "操作时间" desc

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system |  select  DISTINCT ( regexp_extract("user.username", '^system:node:(.*)', 1) ) as "节点名"

* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", regexp_extract( "requestURI", 'nodes/([^/\?]+)', 1) as "节点", 
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", 
requestObject as "详细内容", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID" from log  order by "操作时间" desc

* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", regexp_extract( "requestURI", 'nodes/([^/\?]+)', 1) as "节点", 
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", 
requestObject as "详细内容", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID" from log  order by "操作时间" desc

search.query:
eviction and objectRef.resource: pods  and verb: create     | SELECT date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%Y-%m-%d %T' ) as "操作时间", "objectRef.namespace" as namespace,  "objectRef.name" as pod, 
 CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", "responseStatus.code" as "状态码", 
CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as "源地址", auditID as "事件ID" from log   order by "操作时间" desc

* and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system |  select diff[1] as "总数", (diff[1] - diff[2]) as inc from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(DISTINCT "user.username") as total   from log))
search.tokenQuery: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and objectRef.subresource:status  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch ) and user.username: node and user.username: system |  select diff[1] as "总数", (diff[1] - diff[2]) as inc from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(DISTINCT "user.username") as total   from log))

search.query: * and objectRef.resource : nodes and  (verb : create ) |  select diff[1] as "总数", (diff[1] - diff[2]) as inc from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(DISTINCT "user.username") as total   from log))

* and objectRef.resource : nodes and  (verb : delete ) |  select diff[1] as "总数", (diff[1] - diff[2]) as inc from (select compare( total , 86400) as diff from( select count(DISTINCT "user.username") as total   from log))

* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager  |  select  CASE WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1) ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  as "操作账号", count(1) as total group by "操作账号"

* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager  |  select sum(total) as t, ip_to_country(ip) as country  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip having ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet' and ip not LIKE '%,%' and not try(is_subnet_of('7.0.0.0/8', ip)) limit 10000 ) group by country limit 10000

* and objectRef.resource : nodes  and   (verb : update or verb : put or verb : patch )  NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager  |   select sum(total) as T, ip_to_province(ip) as p  from (select CASE WHEN json_array_length(sourceIPs) = 1 then json_format(json_array_get(sourceIPs, 0)) ELSE  sourceIPs END
as ip, count(1) as total from log  group by ip having ip_to_domain(ip) != 'intranet' and ip not LIKE '%,%' and not try(is_subnet_of('7.0.0.0/8', ip)) limit 10000) group by p  limit 10000

* NOT  user.username: node NOT  user.username: serviceaccount NOT  user.username: apiserver NOT  user.username: kube-scheduler NOT  user.username: kube-controller-manager | select "操作账号" from (  select  CASE 
 WHEN "user.username" != 'kubernetes-admin' then "user.username"
 WHEN "user.username" = 'kubernetes-admin' and regexp_like("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", 'RoleBinding') then regexp_extract("annotations.authorization.k8s.io/reason", ' to User "([^"]+)"', 1)
 ELSE 'kubernetes-admin' END  
 as "操作账号", count(1) as total  from log where regexp_like("user.username", '^[\w\-_]+$') group by "操作账号"   HAVING "操作账号" != 'kubernetes-admin' order by total desc  limit 100)
